ROBERT DAVIS ESQ. APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF. MELINDA GUZMAN, ESQ. APPEARING FOR CROSS-DEFENDANT BAYVIEW HUNTERS POINT FOUNDATION FOR COMMUNITY INVOLVEMENT. ARTHUR HARRIS, ESQ. APPEARING FOR CROSS-COMPLAINANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO. THE COURT GRANTS CROSS-DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO CONTINUE TRIAL. THE TRIAL DATE OF 7/22/24 IS CONTINUED TO 1/27/25 AT 9:30AM IN DEPT. 206. PARTIES ARE GOING TO PRIVATE MEDIATION IN OCTOBER OF THIS YEAR. IF MEDIATION IS UNSUCCESSFUL, PARTIES TO CONTACT THE ADR COORDINATOR NO LATER THAN 6 WEEKS BEFORE THE TRIAL DATE TO SET A MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. DISCOVERY WILL TRACK THE NEW TRIAL DATE. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: ANNE-CHRISTINE MASSULLO; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)

MOTION TO CONTINUE JURY TRIAL
Off Calendar Jun-18-2024 Text Ruling

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File Cross-Complaint
Off Calendar Dec-28-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: CROSS-DEFENDANT CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO's Motion For Leave To File Cross-Complaint.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Defendant City and County of San Francisco's Motion for Leave to File Cross-Complaint, which is the subject of a stipulation between all current parties in this action, is granted. The proposed cross-complaint would have the effect of bringing in as cross-defendants two new parties: Bayview Hunters Point Foundation and Heluna Health. The matter has been pending since August 2021. Trial is currently set for July 22, 2024, and discovery cut-offs currently run from this date. Good cause supports the request in that the cross-complaint appear appropriate and the City has adequately explained its delay in seeking permission to file its cross-complaint.

Order signed.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn; Clerk: S. Kane; Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
